title: cast to int gives different results for decimal than double
poc: select cast(cast(13.8 as decimal(10,7)) as int);
select cast(cast(13.8 as double) as int);
key_bug_features: casting decimal and double to int yields different results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_casts (id INT, dec_value DECIMAL(10, 7), dbl_value DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO test_casts (id, dec_value, dbl_value) VALUES (1, 13.8, 13.8);
SELECT id, cast(dec_value as int) AS dec_to_int, cast(dbl_value as int) AS dbl_to_int FROM test_casts;
SELECT id, cast(cast(dec_value AS decimal(10, 7)) AS int) AS dec_casted, cast(cast(dbl_value AS double) AS int) AS dbl_casted FROM test_casts;
SELECT id, CASE WHEN dec_value IS NULL THEN 'NULL' ELSE cast(dec_value AS int) END AS dec_null_handling FROM test_casts;
